info.title: Midi Kaval API
info.description: Kaval Online case management platform REST API.

post.summary: Issues a time-limited SAS URL for uploading an attachment blob.
Confirms a blob upload and returns a time-limited read URL.

get.summary: Issues a fresh time-limited read URL for a confirmed attachment.

post.summary: Validate credentials and send an email OTP challenge.
Verify OTP and issue JWT access and refresh tokens.
Rotate refresh token and issue a new JWT access token.
Revoke refresh token and clear session cookie.
Request a password reset link (always returns generic success).
Reset password using a single-use token from email.

get.summary: Return the authenticated user profile.

post.summary: Send a step-up OTP challenge to the authenticated field worker.
Verify step-up OTP without rotating refresh token.

get.summary: Lists visits for a case (supervisor visibility including reschedule reasons).

post.summary: Schedules a field visit for a case.

get.summary: Lists chronological case notes for a case timeline.

post.summary: Creates a typed note on a case.

get.summary: Lists interventions for a case.

post.summary: Creates an intervention on a case.

get.summary: Gets a single intervention on a case.

patch.summary: Updates an intervention on a case.

get.summary: Lists court sittings for a case.

post.summary: Creates a court sitting on a case.

get.summary: Gets a single court sitting on a case.

patch.summary: Updates a court sitting on a case.

post.summary: Verifies case GPS coordinates and landmark for the assigned field worker.
Reveal full beneficiary PII for an assigned POCSO case after recent OTP verification.

get.summary: Returns upcoming court sittings assigned to the current field worker.

put.summary: Register or update the current user's device push token.

get.summary: Lists submitted travel claims awaiting director approval.
Returns a travel claim for director review.
Returns API version metadata wrapped in the standard envelope.
Return role-based notification preference defaults (v1 stub).
Returns prioritized crisis queue rows (court-miss only until Epic 8.1).
Returns monthly travel claim totals grouped by staff member.
Returns a travel claim for coordinator read-only review.

post.summary: Replays queued offline mutations idempotently.

get.summary: Lists travel claims for the authenticated field worker.

post.summary: Creates a draft travel claim.

get.summary: Returns a single travel claim owned by the authenticated field worker.

patch.summary: Updates a draft travel claim owned by the authenticated field worker.

post.summary: Submits a draft travel claim for supervisor review.
Approves a submitted travel claim (Director only).
Returns a submitted travel claim to the claimant with comment (Director only).

get.summary: Returns visits scheduled for the current UTC day.
Returns proximity-based grouping suggestions for today's visits.
Returns visits scheduled during the current UTC week (Mon–Sun).
Returns overdue visits assigned to the current field worker.

post.summary: Marks a visit in progress for the assigned field worker.
Marks a visit completed and increments the parent case visit count.
Reschedules a visit with a supervisor-visible reason.

LoginRequest.description: Login request with email and password.

expiresInSeconds.description: Seconds until the OTP challenge expires.

LoginResponse.description: Login challenge issued after password validation.

refreshToken.description: Opaque refresh token (optional when cookie is set).

deviceInstallId.description: Stable device install id to unregister push token on logout.

refreshToken.description: Opaque refresh token (optional when cookie is set).

RefreshRequest.description: Refresh token request for mobile clients.

token.description: Opaque token from the reset email link.

challengeId.description: Challenge identifier for step-up OTP verification.

expiresInSeconds.description: Seconds until the OTP challenge expires.

StepUpResponse.description: Step-up OTP challenge issued to an authenticated field worker.

refreshToken.description: Opaque refresh token for mobile clients.

VerifyOtpResponse.description: Tokens issued after successful OTP verification.
